name: homelab
description: A Pulumi provider for managing homelab infrastructure via the Dockge REST API

url.description: The URL of the Dockge server (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:5001)

apiKey.description: API key for authenticating with the Dockge REST API

url.description: The URL of the Dockge server (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:5001)

apiKey.description: API key for authenticating with the Dockge REST API

url.description: The URL of the Dockge server

apiKey.description: API key for authenticating with the Dockge REST API

homelab:index:ContainerInfo.description: Information about a container within a stack.

homelab:index:Stack.description: Manages a Docker Compose stack on a Dockge server via the REST API. Supports creating, updating, starting, stopping, and deleting stacks.

name.description: The stack name. Must be unique on the Dockge server.

composeYaml.description: The Docker Compose YAML content for this stack.

envFile.description: Optional .env file content for the stack.

composeOverride.description: Optional docker-compose.override.yml content for the stack.

autostart.description: Whether the stack should autostart (default: false).

displayName.description: Optional display name for the stack.

running.description: Whether the stack should be running (default: true).

displayName.description: The display name for the stack.

status.description: The current stack status (running, exited, stopped, partial, unknown).

containers.description: Information about the containers in this stack.

homelab:index:TraefikStaticConfig.description: Manages the Traefik static configuration file (traefik.yml) via the Dockge REST API.

content.description: The YAML content of the Traefik static configuration file.
The YAML content of the static configuration.

lastModified.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification.

homelab:index:TraefikRoute.description: Manages a Traefik dynamic route configuration file via the Dockge REST API.

name.description: The route name (maps to filename: name → configs/name.yml). Must match ^[a-z0-9_-]+$.

content.description: The YAML content of the route configuration file.
The YAML content of the route configuration.

lastModified.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification.

nodejs.packageDescription: A Pulumi provider for managing homelab infrastructure
